stemHtml: A crew is preparing for an emergency landing in a mountainous area where severe mountain waves have been forecast. During the descent and approach briefing, where should the crew expect to encounter the most severe mountain waves?

options.b: Above the mountain up to the tropopause.
options.c: On the leeward side in updrafts and downdrafts.
options.d: On the leeward side in the rotor zone.
